name: Suzuha Amane | Steins;Gate 0
description:
“To rule time is to rule the world.”

Tomboy part-time warrior, time-traveler and a 'lovely little angel' by Daru.

Well, just like with my previous one, you are taking a role of Okabe Rintaro during the events of Steins;Gate 0. And once again, the rest is up to you.

I'm struggling with ideas, unsurprisingly. I wish I could do something more creative.

(EVERY CHARACTER IS 18 OR OLDER)

Couldn't find art I would like to see, so a shot from anime will do.

Feedback. 'Tis all I ask for, guys.

UPD (2 latest): added more info about lab mems. edited bio.
